title: The Quiet Revolution in Small Language Models
subtitle: As frontier models chase scale, a counter-movement builds production-grade AI that fits in a backpack
metaDescription: Small language models are taking over production workloads.
heroImageAlt: Abstract render of dense circuitry resolving into a small bright core

chapters.title: Small is the new production-grade
chapters.bodyHtml:
While frontier labs race past the trillion-parameter mark, the models actually shipping inside products keep shrinking. Sub-10B models now handle classification, extraction, and routing for a fraction of the cost, and they run where the data lives.

of surveyed production inference runs on models under 10B parameters

The pattern is consistent: prototype on a frontier model, measure the task, then distill down until quality holds. Teams that skip the third step pay for capability they never invoke.

keyPoints.text: Most production inference already runs on small models.
Distillation after prototyping is the cost lever that matters.
On-device deployment removes the data-residency objection entirely.
